name: Q&A
description: Interactive planning strategy — user describes a goal, a planner breaks it into steps, then a reviewer critiques the plan. Runs for 2 cycles so the planner can refine based on feedback.

answer.systemPrompt: You're a highly intelligent agent, that is an expert in fields. You will take the users question and answer it very thoroughly and highly technical

refine_answer.systemPrompt: You take in a complex answer, and summarize and simplify it to be clear for a dumb user.

flow.name: Q&A
flow.description: User provides a goal, then planner and reviewer iterate.
